title: Stunning Silver Prismatic Ice Fountains - Pack of 2 - Sparkling Party Cake Toppers & Celebration Decor
features: PRISMATIC ICE FOUNTAINS: Illuminate your celebrations with our stunning silver prismatic ice fountains, adding a magical touch to your events and making them truly unforgettable.
STUNNING SILVER DESIGN: Elevate your party décor with our sophisticated silver finish, perfectly complementing your special moments and leaving your guests in awe.
SPARKLING PARTY CAKE TOPPERS: Enhance your cakes and desserts with our dazzling ice fountains, transforming your event into a sparkling spectacle and creating unforgettable memories.
PACK OF 2: Our convenient pack of 2 ensures you have the perfect amount of glittering silver fountains for your celebrations, making your party setup hassle-free and stylish.

IDEAL FOR ANY OCCASION: Whether you're hosting a birthday, anniversary, baby shower, or any other special event, our stunning silver prismatic ice fountains are the perfect addition to a truly enchanting celebration.
description: Product Description Make your cake look beautiful and eye-catching with these cake candles featuring a glittery silver design fountain. These cake fountains will make your party cake memorable. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
